header.description: Automatically append form responses to a Google Spreadsheet as new rows

name.label: Plugin Name
name.hint: A descriptive name to identify this integration

connection.title: Google Account
connection.description: Connect your Google account to allow writing to Google Sheets
connection.notConnectedHint: Connect your Google account to start syncing responses to a spreadsheet. A new spreadsheet will be created automatically on the first submission.
connection.popupBlocked: Could not open the Google login popup. Please allow popups for this site and try again.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: On the first form submission, a new Google Sheet is created automatically in your Google Drive.
howItWorks.step2: A header row is written with all form field names, submission time, and response ID.
howItWorks.step3: Every subsequent submission appends a new row to the sheet.

validation.notConnected: Please connect your Google account first

toasts.disconnectedDescription: Your Google account has been disconnected
